module_info.docstring:
Send Message Tool -- cross-channel messaging via platform APIs.

Sends a message to a user or channel on any connected messaging platform
(Telegram, Discord, Slack). Supports listing available targets and resolving
human-friendly channel names to IDs. Works in both CLI and gateway contexts.

functions.name: _handle_list
functions.docstring: Return formatted list of available messaging targets.

functions.name: _handle_send
functions.docstring: Send a message to a platform target.

functions.name: _send_to_platform
functions.docstring: Route a message to the appropriate platform sender.

functions.name: _send_telegram
functions.docstring: Send via Telegram Bot API (one-shot, no polling needed).

functions.name: _send_discord
functions.docstring: Send via Discord REST API (no websocket client needed).

functions.name: _check_send_message
functions.docstring: Gate send_message on gateway running (always available on messaging platforms).
